query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by parcel area descending, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in utlopomr

3.description: select quick-clay polygons for the high risk class (use value from step 2)

4.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2 and compute area_m2

5.description: get county polygons and names to map municipality to county

6.description: find which fylke contains the Trondheim municipality (join step 1 and step 5)

7.description: reduce quick-clay polygons (step 3) to those that intersect Trondheim municipality (step 1)

8.description: find parcels (step 4) that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons (step 7)

9.description: collapse duplicates: one row per parcel (group by teigid, objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn) and keep area_m2 as MIN(area_m2)

10.description: sort parcels by area_m2 descending (will be followed by a limit step executed after validation if needed)

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';
